'''sothashaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:ileogastric|ileogastric]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-th-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ileogastric|ileogastric]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| sothashaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:sothashithi|sothashithi]] || [[word:sothashiji|sothashiji]] || [[word:sothashishi|sothashishi]] || [[word:sothashiki|sothashiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:sothashuthuthu|sothashuthuthu]] || [[word:sothashujuju|sothashujuju]] || [[word:sothashushushu|sothashushushu]] || [[word:sothashukuku|sothashukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:sothashuthu|sothashuthu]] || [[word:sothashuju|sothashuju]] || [[word:sothashushu|sothashushu]] || [[word:sothashuku|sothashuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:sothashufthuf|sothashufthuf]] || [[word:sothashufjuf|sothashufjuf]] || [[word:sothashufshuf|sothashufshuf]] || [[word:sothashufkuf|sothashufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:sothashethe|sothashethe]] || [[word:sothasheje|sothasheje]] || [[word:sothasheshe|sothasheshe]] || [[word:sothasheke|sothasheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:sothashothotho|sothashothotho]] || [[word:sothashojojo|sothashojojo]] || [[word:sothashoshosho|sothashoshosho]] || [[word:sothashokoko|sothashokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:sothashotho|sothashotho]] || [[word:sothashojo|sothashojo]] || [[word:sothashosho|sothashosho]] || [[word:sothashoko|sothashoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:sothashofthof|sothashofthof]] || [[word:sothashofjof|sothashofjof]] || [[word:sothashofshof|sothashofshof]] || [[word:sothashofkof|sothashofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:sothashĂŻfthĂŻf|sothashĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:sothashĂŻfjĂŻf|sothashĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:sothashĂŻfshĂŻf|sothashĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:sothashĂŻfkĂŻf|sothashĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:sothashĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|sothashĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:sothashĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|sothashĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:sothashĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|sothashĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:sothashĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|sothashĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:sothashĂŻfthĂŻf|sothashĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:sothashĂŻfjĂŻf|sothashĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:sothashĂŻfshĂŻf|sothashĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:sothashĂŻfkĂŻf|sothashĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:sothashĂŻfthĂŻf|sothashĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:sothashĂŻfjĂŻf|sothashĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:sothashĂŻfshĂŻf|sothashĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:sothashĂŻfkĂŻf|sothashĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:sothashĂŠthĂŠ|sothashĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:sothashĂŠjĂŠ|sothashĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:sothashĂŠshĂŠ|sothashĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:sothashĂŠkĂŠ|sothashĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:sothashathatha|sothashathatha]] || [[word:sothashajaja|sothashajaja]] || [[word:sothashashasha|sothashashasha]] || [[word:sothashakaka|sothashakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:sothashatha|sothashatha]] || [[word:sothashaja|sothashaja]] || [[word:sothashasha|sothashasha]] || [[word:sothashaka|sothashaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:sothashafthaf|sothashafthaf]] || [[word:sothashafjaf|sothashafjaf]] || [[word:sothashafshaf|sothashafshaf]] || [[word:sothashafkaf|sothashafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:sothashasha|sothashasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:sothashshĂ«asha|sothashshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:sothashroasha|sothashroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:sothashmuasha|sothashmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:sothashyaasha|sothashyaasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gosothashnkshĂ«asha|gosothashnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosothashnkroasha|gosothashnkroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosothashnkmuasha|gosothashnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gosothashnkyaasha|gosothashnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:sothathashasha|sothathashasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:sothathashshĂ«asha|sothathashshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:sothathashroasha|sothathashroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:sothathashmuasha|sothathashmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:sothathashyaasha|sothathashyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gosothathashnkshĂ«asha|gosothathashnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosothathashnkroasha|gosothathashnkroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosothathashnkmuasha|gosothathashnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gosothathashnkyaasha|gosothathashnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:sethĂŠshasha|sethĂŠshasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:sethĂŠshshĂ«asha|sethĂŠshshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:sethĂŠshroasha|sethĂŠshroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:sethĂŠshmuasha|sethĂŠshmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:sethĂŠshyaasha|sethĂŠshyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gosethĂŠshnkshĂ«asha|gosethĂŠshnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosethĂŠshnkroasha|gosethĂŠshnkroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosethĂŠshnkmuasha|gosethĂŠshnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gosethĂŠshnkyaasha|gosethĂŠshnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:sothfashasha|sothfashasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:sothfashshĂ«asha|sothfashshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:sothfashroasha|sothfashroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:sothfashmuasha|sothfashmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:sothfashyaasha|sothfashyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gosothfashnkshĂ«asha|gosothfashnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosothfashnkroasha|gosothfashnkroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosothfashnkmuasha|gosothfashnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gosothfashnkyaasha|gosothfashnkyaasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5db7a01}}
